name_en: ❤️B's latest tote, crafted from calfskin suede. Made in an Italian workshop with matching fabric lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and a top handle. Includes a detachable leather shoulder strap for easy switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. Embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD) on the back. Dimensions 30 x 13 x 24cm.
